source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001761312 + web-sourced price/estimates (see field-level provenance)
_note: Specialty insurer: cash - debt is NOT meaningful net cash (loss reserves/float are operating liabilities; 'cash' excludes the ~$1.5B+ investment portfolio). net_cash output is n/m for a financial. total_debt is holding-co debt; see debt_to_equity context field.

price.source: stockanalysis.com/stocks/plmr/ - NASDAQ close quote, Jun 10 2026 4:00PM EDT (intraday cross-check ~$109.80-112.00 range same day)

eps_ttm.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001761312 (EarningsPerShareDiluted, FY2025); stockanalysis.com also lists $7.17 as TTM EPS as of 2026-06-10. NOTE: FY2025 figure, not TTM-through-Q1-2026 (Q1 2026 was a beat, so TTM is likely modestly higher)

dividend_per_share.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts - no common dividend tags found; PLMR pays no dividend

total_debt.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001761312 (LongTermDebt) - holding-co debt

cash.source: SEC EDGAR companyfacts CIK0001761312 (CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue). Insurer: excludes investment portfolio; cash-minus-debt is n/m as 'net cash' for a financial

debt_to_equity.source: computed: total_debt 297,434,000 / stockholders_equity 959,039,000 (both SEC EDGAR, 2026-03-31), python-computed

long_term_growth_estimate_pct.source: ESTIMATE - analyst consensus EPS growth ~19.9%/yr (public.com forecast page); aggregator range 19.9-22.7% (Simply Wall St 22.7%); next-FY consensus EPS $9.81 (Stockopedia); company FY2026 guidance ~24% adj. net income growth. Conservative end used. Historical FY2021-25 EPS CAGR is ~42% (proven, but decelerating base)

institutional_ownership_pct.source: MarketBeat institutional-ownership page (Fintel shows 450 holders / ~25.3M of 26.5M shares ~95%; estimates range 93-98%)

insider_activity.value: Modest routine selling: CEO Mac Armstrong family trust sold 3,500 sh (~$458K, ~1% of his indirect holdings) 2026-04-21; CRO sell-to-cover 281 sh on RSU vest 2026-02-18. No open-market buys found in 2026
insider_activity.source: SEC Form 4 filings via StockTitan / secform4.com / Motley Fool filings coverage

combined_ratio_fy2025.source: Palomar Q4/FY2025 earnings release (ir.palomarspecialty.com / 8-K ex-99.1): FY2025 combined ratio 76.9%, adjusted combined ratio 72.7% (vs 73.7% FY2024); adjusted ROE 23.6%

gross_written_premium_growth_fy2025_pct.source: Palomar Q4/FY2025 earnings release (ir.palomarspecialty.com / 8-K ex-99.1): FY2025 GWP +31.5% to ~$2.0B; adjusted net income +62% to $216.1M
